chapter_title.ar: باب شُرْبِ الْمَاءِ مِنْ قِيَامٍ وَ الشُّرْبِ فِي نَفَسٍ وَاحِدٍ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 4 – Drinking the water whilst standing and drinking it in one breath

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/232)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/232)
text: قَامَ أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) إِلَى إِدَاوَةٍ فَشَرِبَ مِنْهَا وَ هُوَ قَائِمٌ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Muhammad Bin Ali, from Abdul Rahman Bin Abu Hashim, from Abu Hashim Bin Yahya Al Madainy,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Amir Al-Momineen<sup>asws</sup> had a water container, so he<sup>asws</sup> drank from it and he<sup>asws</sup> was standing’.
en.sarwar: 3. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from Muhammad ibn Ali from ‘Abd al-Rahman ibn abu Hashim [from abu Hashim] ibn Yahya al-Mada’iniy who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that ’Amir al-Mu’minin went to the water container and drank water standing.’”
